title: Transformable, Record-Based Data Loader
overview: A #Data Loader is configured to upsert Leads from a CSV file using the Email field as the match key. Records with an existing Email are updated; otherwise, new Leads are inserted.
generalUseCase: Use #Data Loader to ingest CSV data, apply scoping, matching, and field transformations, then action target records—reusable, native in Salesforce, and generating online execution logs for troubleshooting and compliance.
